properties.query: SELECT c.course_id, c.title, u.user_no, u.user_id, u.user_name, u.user_phone_number FROM course c JOIN enrollment e ON c.course_id = e.course_id JOIN student s ON e.student_id = s.student_id JOIN user u ON s.user_no = u.user_no WHERE u.status = true ORDER BY c.course_id;
select course_id from enrollment where student_id = ?
SELECT enrollment_id, progress_rate, course_id FROM enrollment WHERE enrollment_id = ?

UPDATE enrollment SET progress_rate = progress_rate + 10, end_date = CASE WHEN progress_rate >= 100 THEN CURRENT_DATE ELSE end_date END, status = CASE WHEN progress_rate >= 100 THEN 1 ELSE status END WHERE student_id = ? AND course_id = ? AND progress_rate < 100
SELECT c.course_id, c.title, e.progress_rate FROM enrollment e JOIN course c ON e.course_id = c.course_id WHERE e.student_id = ? AND e.status = 0;
